1317:                            "beat": _fp_beat,
1318:                        })
1319:                    continue

1324:                if item is _sentinel:

1635:            # CRITICAL: loop.run_in_executor does NOT propagate ContextVars
1636:            # to the worker thread by default. Without ctx.run wrapping,

1641:            # his browser; Jarvis dispatched operator_launch_app to the owner's

1643:            # PID on the owner's machine, even though the chat session, user_id
1644:            # attribution, and visible_run context were all correctly the other user.
1645:            # Re-assert tool-scope before snapshotting the context. The scope

1647:            # reliably survive to this point across the async-generator/executor
1648:            # boundary — role/user_id do, scope does not. Observed live
1649:            # 2026-06-21: Mikkel (member) in code mode → execute_tool's role-gate
1650:            # saw role='member' but scope='' → operator_* denied with
1651:            # tool_not_permitted, even though the tools were OFFERED in code
1652:            # scope. Re-asserting from the known run scope makes copy_context()
1653:            # capture it so execute_tool's gate (simple_tools.execute_tool) sees
1654:            # the correct scope.
1655:            if tool_scope:
1656:                try:

1664:            # usynlig → operator-tools afvist med tool_not_permitted TRODS en aktiv
1665:            # override (rod-årsag til "3-4 kald så blok", Bjørn 2026-06-21). Mirrorer
1666:            # scope-re-asserten ovenfor; rører IKKE base-rollen (privatlivs-carve-out
1667:            # §6.5 intakt: override forbliver en elevering, ikke en native owner).
1668:            try:
1669:                from core.identity.workspace_context import set_session_id as _set_sid
1670:                if getattr(run, "session_id", ""):

1672:            except Exception:

1676:            # lossy executor-kontekst og fornyer IKKE pålideligt (ved owner-uid-flip

1678:            # vinduet midt i en lang operator-sekvens → operator-tools låses med

1696:            # i live gennem hele det tavse vindue. shield → en spuriøs cancel dræber ikke
1697:            # selve tool-arbejdet. Spejler den agentiske tool-exec-pumpe (~linje 3332).
